reviews.author: The MY World
reviews.text: This kinda monument. I think this is a kind of most north point at Vietnam coast.

reviews.author: D.n.y Tr.
reviews.text: Good place to be there as starting point of Vietnam sea coat. Image it lasts to Hà Tiên border with Cambodia... and has so many types of sea beaches, sands ... and many resorts...!

reviews.author: Koc Moc
reviews.text: Feel great to go to the start of Vietnam coast. Although there are not much to see here, it is a memorable place to go to.

reviews.author: Quang Do
reviews.text: As a Vietnamese you should be proud of this place.
